title: Hitmarkers
description: Add useful bow hitmarkers to your server!
body:
![Resource Header](https://norska.dev/resources/hitmarkers/resource_header.png)

## Features
### General
- Fully configurable hitmarker events.
- Three different types, normal, headshot and kill shot.
- Feature to deal more damage when landing a headshot (players only).
- Customizable command to toggle hitmarkers.
- Ability to use them on players only or mobs too.
- Add permission-based arrow trails for your players (example: hm.user.trail.FLAME, hm.user.trail.SPELL_WITCH).

###  Norska Development Resource Quality
- Auto-updating configurations on plugin updates.
- Fully customizable messages including chat (option to auto-center), actionbars, and titles. (RGB Support)
- Fully customizable sounds (option for power and pitch), for every command and event.
- Use any PlaceholderAPI placeholder in plugin messages.

## Gallery

![](https://norska.dev/resources/hitmarkers/stuff.png)
![](https://norska.dev/resources/hitmarkers/trails.gif)

## Default configurations
- View the default config file [here](https://norska.dev/resources/hitmarkers/defaultconfig)!
- View the default messages file [here](hhttps://norska.dev/resources/hitmarkers/defaultmessages)!

## Developer API 
- Information about the available Developer API can be found [here](https://norska.dev/docs/premium/uar/api)
